---
title: "Leadership Connect"
page-layout: article
---

# Leadership Connect

## Description

Directory of leaders and organizations in business, government, and nonprofit sectors in the United States. Useful for contact research and organizational mapping.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data

## Access notes

Requires users to sign in with an @Yale.edu email address. Users will be directed to the Yale CAS sign-in page. Note: The export function is not available with our subscription.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-leadership-connect)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
